decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 44/3374 lines reworked (1.3%, 34/50). 0/29 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 0.5% (17/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 68. Session 12: 53 (process:40 efficiency:10 ttfw:3).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 259/259 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
